title: Cartesian
description: Cartesian: A three-dimensional Cartesian coordinate system, as defined by a set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors and a common origin point

X.description: Unit vector defining local x coordinate axis Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Y.description: Unit vector defining local y coordinate axis Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Z.description: Unit vector defining local z coordinate axis Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Origin.description: Location point in three-dimensional space defining (0,0,0) and the origin for each axis Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
